message:
fix: use types.StatusClosed constant and config-driven thresholds in compact.go (bd-17p)

Replace hardcoded "closed" string literal with types.StatusClosed in
CheckEligibility. Replace hardcoded 30/90 day thresholds with config-driven
values from compact_tier1_days/compact_tier2_days keys (falling back to
defaults). Also parameterize the SQL queries in GetTier1Candidates and
GetTier2Candidates to use the constant and config values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/jasper
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
